prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-TANGOSCOPE-40002-TSM Product Type: LEVEL Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Flatline Ops Tango SM Compatible for Spuhr Mounted Adjustable Articulating Scope Bubble Level Description: A long-range shot has many factors to take into consideration to be sure you are on target, and our ACCU/LEVEL system aids in the correction of "cant error," giving you dead-on true vertical hold. The bubble level also features an ultra-low profile and machine precision design to make sure you are locked into place before taking that critical shot.

The TANGO SM ACCU/LEVEL is Flatline Ops' newest mounted scope level is compatible for SPUHR. It boasts the industry's only compatible for SPUHR adaptable level that is 'micro fine adjustable after installation. The Tango SM features an interface locating rings that nest into the SPUHR interface to assure a precision fitment. At only 0.7oz, the ultra-lightweight design is Machined from 6061-T6 aerospace grade aluminum and Mil Spec type III hard anodized for harsh conditions and abuse.

The Tango SM has a patented articulating level arm, when not in use, the arm can be tucked into the body for safe travel and protection. When you are ready to use it, simply articulate the level arm out and you are ready to go.


IMPORTANT FITMENT INFORMATION

SPUHR Mount Fitment: The Tango SM fits SPUHR Mount Models: SA, SP, SS, ST, and QDP. Other models may vary and may not be compatible. The mounting locations may vary depending on scope brand, tube, and turret size and compatible for SPURH Mount model and size. We recommend running the Tango SM in the rear lower interface locations for best sight acquisition.

More Information
-Ultra-lightweight design
-Quick and easy installation
-Install without removing scope (in most cases)
-Ships with instructions and all installation tools

Please Note: Fluid is not chemically enhanced with properties to actually glow or fluorescein black out scenarios. Search Terms: scope level firearms accessories scopes thermal spotting reticle rifle sling bubble accuracy picatinny accurate first leevl anti cant leveling jig Features: - COMPATIBLE FOR SPUHR MOUNTED ACCURACY - The Tango SM is the industry's only compatible for SPUHR adaptable level that was designed with a patented articulating level arm so you can easily tuck it into the body for safe travel and protection when not in use. - SOLID, DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Each level is machined from advanced 6061-T6 aircraft aluminum and then black hard anodized to protect it from the extremes of the outdoors. It's also designed to fit either right or left-handed shooters. - HIGH VISIBILITY - Made with high visibility fluorescent fluid, the green level is easy to visually acquire and locate before each shot. - ULTRA-LOW DESIGN - This scope level was designed with ultra-low profile and machine precision in mind to make sure you are locked into place before taking that critical shot. - TECH SPECS: Mounting: Compatible for SPUHR mount adaptive; Profile: Ultra-low profile; Material: Milspec Type III Black Hard Anodized; Hardware: Stainless Steel; Level: High Visibility Fluorescent green fluid; Weight: .75oz === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
